Commander... Would you come sit with me, just for a moment?
Akagi...
Ryuuhou, please...
...Fine, I won't object. Commander, your thoughts?
I accept her proposal, and we all take a short break.
The Sakurans and girls from other fleets naturally split into two separate groups, so I sit right between them.
Zuikaku and Ryuuhou aside, those of us less familiar with Sakuran affairs seem restless – especially given the state of things outside of the Singularity.
(I understand Akagi's feelings, but this is a serious situation. We can't dilly-dally all day, and I doubt the Sakurans want to indulge her for long.)
(Alright. I think it's time I step in.)

options.content: Are you scared of meeting Amagi?

Homecoming.say: Commander?
I don't really...
Come over here, please.
Zuikaku and Ryuuhou stand up, freeing up space next to me.
You wouldn't understand. You don't know what Amagi means to me... What awful things I've done...
That's why I'm here – to make sure you meet your sister, and to see that everyone makes it out of this in one piece.
Even now, so many fleets are doing their damnedest to fight off the corrosion.
Now more than ever, we need you to be a leader.
Commander... Okay. But I just need a little longer.
That's fine by me.
Thank you. As soon as I finish this tea, we can go–
Akagi? Good morning!
Naka and Hatakaze? Are you two going out?
Yes, we were thinking of going out to sea for training. Incidentally, who is that next to you?
Just visitors coming to see Amagi.
Oh, she's playing Go with Kaga in the parlor. Want me to let Jintsuu know?
That won't be necessary. You two can just get to your training, thank you.
Yes, ma'am! I'll go ahead and do just that!
While the two of them left, there was a faint glint in Hatakaze's eyes – however, none of the visitors would notice.
*sigh*... Okay. Let us depart.
It's time... for us to meet Amagi.

Reunion.say: Slowly but surely, the Amagi sisters return to us.
Manage to talk things through?
Commander...
Heehee. Indeed, all's well that ends well. Thanks for your time and understanding, Commander.
Speaking of time, that's not something we have a lot of.
In that case, please give us your instructions~
Akagi? You're still alive?!
Amagi... What in the world is going on?
I thought Akagi was devoured by her META self...
Nope. This is the same Akagi that we've always known.
The "META" we saw was but a temporary state. Without a concept to anchor itself to, it cannot persist for long.
Which is why it possessed Akagi and took control of her will.
But after exhausting its power during the course of battle, Akagi's consciousness naturally returned...
And thanks to that, I was able to carry out the Commander's plan and bring her back to us.
Everyone... I'm so, so sorry...
Wow, what a crazy turn of events! But right now, I'm just glad you're back in one piece!
And Amagi too!
So, it was your purifying flames...
(Err, sorry, Shinano, but there's a bit of a misunderstanding here...)
(Heehee. Don't worry, Commander. I'll explain things to her later.)
Oh right, Commander. I found something while purifying the META corruption's remnants...
Might this be something useful to you?
Amagi waves her hands gracefully, and two tendrils of light start to flow from her sleeves.
What is this...
(Data pertaining to Amagi's and Kaga's souls. With this, we will be able to fully restore them with all their prior memories and experiences.)
(It makes sense now. So that's why that META targeted Tester's mainframe.)
(Go ahead and store it somewhere safe. I'll deal with rebuilding their hulls later.)
(Looks like miracles do come true after all, huh?)
(By the way, how's the escape route coming along?)
(Everything looks good. Give me ten more minutes.)
(Alrighty, another good deed in the books. Time to go home!)
(Seconded.)

Face to Face.say: Once Akagi calmed down, she arranged a meeting between them all – and me – at the top floor of the mansion.
I have the rest of the fleet wait in the guest room, then I head up the stairs to meet Akagi.
Our mission is do-or-die – we must recover Amagi's hull data and neutralize the Naraka Singularity.
Amagi's Mansion - Top Floor
Amagi sits on the chief seat. Akagi and Kaga the battleship sit to her sides.
(As far as the Amagi of this world is concerned, she and I are total strangers.)
(And yet, somehow, I get the feeling that she knows who I am.)
You must be the... Commander. Thank you for coming all this way.
While Akagi told me where you're from, she has yet to tell me what the specific goal of your journey is.
I've been told you're here to "save me," but if I may ask, what does that mean?
Thanks for telling her, Akagi. We can cut straight to the chase.
Amagi, you suffer from a hull defect that cannot be cured. It's going to claim your life one day, isn't it?
Yes. What you say is true.
What?! Amagi! You told me you only had a weak constitution!
What's this about a "hull defect" and it "claiming your life one day"? You've never said anything about that!
I hoped that I could keep these things secret forever.
Clearly, the word got out in the end in the world whence you came.
Sister... You knew how bad it was this whole time.
I'm sorry, Akagi.
I knew there was no escaping my fate. I only wanted to arrange some things for you before I passed. I wasn't trying to hide the truth from you.
Additionally, this world is not real. It's a fabricated segment inside of a Singularity dubbed "Naraka."
Akagi and I came here for two things – to revive you both, and to save the world.
If all goes well, you, Amagi, will be able to live in a new future.
Hold up. This world is some fake copy? And what's that about a "Singularity"?
You're bullshitting us, aren't you?
No, Kaga. What the Commander said is all true.
Pfah. That makes no sense, and I don't want it to.
Even if it's true, I couldn't care less. I'm leaving.
Wait. Stay and listen just a while longer.
I get it. My lips are sealed. I won't tell anyone about this.
That's not what I was going to say. I want both Amagi AND you to come with us.
You what?
"Come with you"?
Yes. In our world, you sacrificed your life in hopes of restoring my sanity.
Kaga, please, let's listen to what they have to say. Besides, I have questions to ask. We can decide after that.
Fine. So be it.
{playername}, you say you want to save me and Kaga. What exactly does that entail?
To put it simply, we're going to bring you with us out of this place.
(Helena, do you copy? I'll need your help to explain our plan.)
(Loud and clear. Keep talking and see where the conversation goes.)
I'm afraid I don't follow. You said a minute ago that this world is not real – that it's only a "segment".
If we, too, are mere fabrications, how are you going to bring us into the real world?
(Straight to the crux of the issue... Should I talk about her hull first?
(A hull can be made one of two ways – either with a Wisdom Cube on its own, or with the Watatsumi paired with a Wisdom Cube.)
(When using only a Cube, assuming you have the data to connect to a concept, the Cube itself must provide the energy for a body.)
(That means if you're connecting to data using only a Cube to manifest a hull, the Cube you're using has to be undamaged.)
(On the other hand, if you use both a Cube and the Watatsumi, all the Cube needs is the data to connect to a concept.)
(In other words, the Cube creates the soul, the Watatsumi handles the rest – the body.)
(On the topic at hand, those who leave this segment will be recovered as data. To souls, in other words.)
(By putting their souls in a special receptacle, you can use the Watatsumi to create bodies to place those souls inside, thus letting them live again as shipgirls.)
(For all intents and purposes, this revives them.)
(That was a LOT to take in at once.)
(Amagi is perceptive. She'll know if you skip over details.)
(Unless... You meant that you didn't catch all of that.)
(No, it's fine. I memorized it.)
First of all, let's talk about how a hull is created.
I understand now. My data – my soul – can be transplanted into a new body created in your world to give me new life.
Exactly! It's going to work!
I hope so. If you went through the trouble of recreating an entire world, you must be more than prepared for everything this operation entails.
However, based on what you said, won't I only have memories of what has happened until today?
Seeing as I'm not long for this world, it's not a problem for me...
But in Kaga's case, won't she be practically a stranger compared to the person you've known and fought alongside?
(It's like bringing your past self into the future, skipping over what happened along the way.)
(Our goal is to revive Kaga, but by doing it this way, she won't be the same person as the day she passed.)
We'd need a soul from a time after Amagi perished...
No, Commander, this way might actually be preferable.
It would be better for Kaga... if she forgot about her time with me.
Do you really mean that? I mean, she's your sister, she's–
Enough, Zuikaku. Kaga gave me enough in one life.
Your... sister...
Would you mind telling me how Kaga lost her life?
Well, it's... I'm not sure if...
It's alright, Ryuuhou. I'll tell her everything myself.
I was conducting a ritual with the goal of reviving you, Amagi. Then...
...What?
I did that? The person you're describing was really me?
Heh... Interesting. I can't even imagine what happened between now and then.
A corrupted ritual under a withered Sacred Sakura...
To tell you the truth, I had a dream like that yesterday.
You did? But... How could you possibly have...?
I don't know.
(What's that about, Observer? Didn't you say this segment was based on real data?)
(I did. The Natural Calculation System generated this segment with 100% accuracy, neither adding nor subtracting anything.)
(That makes no sense. How'd Amagi dream of what happens in the future? She's not Shinano – she doesn't draw power from the Watatsumi.)
(I'll look into it. Continue with the mission.)
It stands to reason, then...
If the dream I had yesterday was a vision from your future, have all my other dreams been visions as well?
{playername}, I must ask – have we ever met before?
Heehee. Your ability to stay calm is truly a thing to be studied.
Well, I've asked all my questions.
You've gone through all this trouble to bring me back to life, and I happily accept it.
I put my trust in you both – Commander, Akagi.
Kaga, I'd like you to come with me.
By which I mean, you simply must come along. I'm afraid you have no choice.
Hah. You sure believed them quickly.
You were just feigning ignorance this whole time to drag me into this.
Please, you're overthinking it. I only set my mind to this just now.
Alright. Besides, knowing what's at stake, you'd probably drag me along even if I said no.
Heehee. Then, we've reached an agreement, Commander.
BEEP BEEP!
Amagi, we've got trouble! Strange enemies are attacking the training area!
Strange enemies? What's your status?
We're fighting them as we retreat! Sendai has been hurt!
I understand. Keep retreating.
Roger!
(Now enemies are showing up? This is one dangerous world segment.)
(They're not a part of it. The segment's boundary line has been broken.)
(They – and the corrosion – are invading from Naraka. I'd retreat fast if I were you, because the segment isn't going to last very long.)
(Dammit... Helena, how are the others doing?)
(It's a stalemate. It's not looking dire for them just yet.)
(Good... Then I'm going to save them.)
(Alright. Let's do it your way.)
To think this would happen just as we were about to leave...
Akagi, how would you deal with this situation?
This world is simply a fabrication. As soon as we leave, it's going to disappear.
Our chief goals are to save you and Kaga, deal with the Singularity, and avoid all unnecessary fighting. However...
I've led our country, and we have the Commander here with us. I am not about to turn my back on friends in need of help.
That's good. Commander, what are your thoughts?
Who I am doesn't change whether I'm in a real or fake world. The same is true for my friends and allies.
My morals don't bend simply when it's convenient for me.
I strive to do everything I can, even if the results in the end aren't perfect.
All that is to say – I want to help them.
Thank you. That's a wonderful answer.
(We are who we are, whether our world is fake or real, thus we must help.)
(It's that mindset that makes you, you. It's also why Akagi is so fond of you.)
Let us go, Commander.

When Least Expected.say: I arrive at the rendezvous point with the Sakurans in tow. We cross paths with Sendai's unit, who just shook off their attackers.
Sorry, Amagi. I underestimated their firepower and couldn't do anything to 'em...
What matters is that you're all alright. They caught you by surprise – there shouldn't be any enemies here.
Thanks for the kind words. So, who are these people?
Our guests and our reliable reinforcements.
You've got carrier gear like what Houshou's got... Are you...?
Yes. I'm a carrier, much like Zuikaku and Ryuuhou.
I'm shocked that the corrosion has even made it into Amagi's world...
Zuikaku, Ryuuhou, show them what our carrier fleet is capable of!
Roger!
Sendai, take the severely injured and bring them to the rear. They're not fit for this battle.
Jintsuu, you'll lead the escort fleet. Don't stray too far and be aware of threats both above and below the water.
Kaga, you're coming with me. I'm not letting any of those things near you.
Finally, have the girls of the other factions link up with the escort fleet. Does that sound good, Commander?
She's completely back to her old self.
Should she really be issuing orders, though? This is YOUR fleet, Commander.
It's fine. Real or not, these are Sakuran waters, and Akagi is more familiar with them than I am.
She can be in charge of this battle.
Oh, Commander!
She's leading us? That needy woman?
Crap... Sorry, Amagi. Body moved faster than my brain.
Ugh...
Forgive me, sister... I'm no good at this...
No, you're doing great. This is a spectacular formation.
Really?
Remember the Commander's words. You're in charge of this battle.
It's your time to shine now. Show us how the carriers of the future fight.
Okay! I will!
Get ready, everyone! The fight starts now!
KABOOM!
Hah! Be reduced to ashes!
All that's left is the southern group. These shapeless heaps of corruption are pathetic.
Wooow... You're incredible, Akagi!
Yes, it's like she's a changed person all of a sudden.
The might of a carrier is awe-inspiring.
It's not long before all the invading spawns of corruption have been mopped up.
Akagi's mood has done a complete U-turn – she smiles as she turns to me and Amagi for approval.
But then, tragedy strikes...
Ambush! Look out!
Where'd they come from?!
From the distance, a crimson shimmer comes flying straight toward my command vessel.
Commander!
The girls promptly jump in the way, blocking the path of the object.
This aura... Is it...?
KABOOM!
Coward! Resorted to dirty tricks, huh?!
Kaga aims her cannons and fires a volley, but the crimson light changes course and dodges.
It locks on to a new target – Amagi – and speeds up.
I knew it was you! I'm not letting you hurt them!
Akagi rushes to her sister's side and gets between her and the crimson light, using her own body as a shield.
Before she can get a word out, the world segment is instantly shrouded in darkness.
Even so, a faint voice reaches my ears.
Commander... I'm sorry...
At least this is a fitting end for someone who committed such grave sins in the name of obsession.
Thank you... Thank you for being kind to me to the very end...
Protect... them...
Kaga, Amagi, and all the rest... Protect them...
When the light comes back, Akagi is nowhere to be seen.

Fighting Back.say: When the light comes back, Akagi is nowhere to be seen.
No... How could this...
Akagi?!
(Helena, where is she?!)
(She's no longer in this world segment. I'm still searching, but frankly, I'm not sure she's even alive...)
(Keep searching, please. Observer, what was that attack just now?)
(Multiple forces have infiltrated the segment. One of them was the one that attacked you.)
(Did you say "multiple"? It's not just the corrosion, then?)
(That's right. You don't realize just how popular you are, do you?)
(My friends' lives are on the line. Skip the jokes, please!)
(Heheh, settle down. I know exactly who it was that attacked you.)
(Then tell me.)
(It was the very thing that Akagi created.)
(Of course, I guess you can't really call them impostors anymore at this point...)
(Those things originally took on the concept of Amagi, but after what your buddies did, they're not her anymore.)
(Just one thing...)
(Out with it already.)
(Nope. My relationship with you begins and ends with reviving Amagi. I'm under no obligation to answer your questions.)
(What if I were to ask you instead, then?)
(Ugh... Fine.)
(They were originally born from Akagi's obsession. Now that they've lost the concept of Amagi, they're back to being Akagi.)
(More precisely, the META version of her.)
(Attacking you, attacking Amagi, that was all deception. All this time, they were after Akagi herself.)
(But the concept they've taken on for themselves isn't stable yet. That's why they wanted to take it from the original.)
(Man, no wonder she didn't panic when they attacked. She knew the META would keep attacking you and her sister otherwise!)
(That's enough chit-chat for now. Track the coordinates I've sent you.)
(Yeah, yeah. By the way, Commander, a new one is headed your way right this second.)
After I hang up, a torii gate appears on the water.
A kaleidoscope of glowing butterflies spills out from within, and a silver-haired girl emerges.
Commander?
So the last dream was you...
(Dream? I thought this world segment was reality?)
Shinano? How did you get here?
Commander?! You can see this one...?
I struggle to think of how I'm going to explain this mess to her.
It took a while to properly explain things.
Fortunately, though, Shinano seemed to understand.
I also told her about how Amagi and Kaga had come with us.
After that, we decided to retreat to Amagi's mansion and wait for Observer to provide a safe escape route.
Amagi's Mansion - Courtyard
In short, Yamato contacted Shinano and set things into motion.
She used the grotto to deposit the fallen Sakurans' souls as butterflies and created dreams for Shinano to travel through...
That all sounds right to me.
So Yamato's already reached the truth of test site beta's Cubes...
I knew Shinano could travel through dreams, but not that she could use them as a means of instant teleportation.
Not quite. That wasn't the real Shinano – it was more like a simulation made of her data.
Oh? Does that mean she was replicated in this segment like Amagi and Kaga were?
Exactly.
Then why did Yamato bring her here? It sounds like she herself doesn't even know.
We'll have to think about that another time. More pressingly, we have an update on Akagi.
Heheh, wanna guess how she's doing right now?
Bleh. Doesn't look like you wanna play along.
First off, she's alive. But she's stuck with her META counterpart.
They're in a place similar to this world segment, but it's smaller and less detailed than this one.
I guarantee you she made it with data stolen from Tester's mainframe.
Back on topic, though, the META made that place in advance. She was planning to escape there from the jump.
I wouldn't recommend going there.
Why not?
It's too dangerous, obviously. This segment is already unstable, and if you keep wasting time, your plan's gonna fall apart.
Don't you think you should prioritize getting out of Naraka and reviving Amagi?
I get that you care about her, but she chose this. My opinion? Leave her for now.
As if I could. I'm the one who brought her here, and it's my responsibility to take her home safe.
Come on, Helena. Talk some sense into your boss here.
...Commander, are you really going to save her?
Okay.
Observer is right about one thing – this world segment can't be maintained for much longer.
Souls extracted from it need to be stored quickly, or else they'll be contaminated by Naraka's corrosion. But if you exit now for that purpose, it'll be too late to save Akagi.
If you want to save her... then you'll need to revive Amagi and Kaga right here and now.
Here? How?
All of the materials needed to create shipgirls are present.
Their soul data, the Watatsumi that can materialize their data as bodies, and the supplies necessary for the process.
Supplies are easy enough to procure. Meanwhile, the souls and the Watatsumi are right in front of you.
You mean Shinano's amulet?
But it's just a replication made by this world segment, right? It's not real.
Real or not, the Watatsumi is the Watatsumi.
You don't mean...
The reality you believe in will become the truth.
"Reality and truth are not always one and the same. Reality can only be truth if enough faith goes into it."
Tell me something. If we resurrect Amagi with the data we have now, will she still have her hull defect?
She will. It'll essentially reinitialize her hull status. We will be unable to excise it.
...She was supposed to be retrofitted into a carrier.
If we could affix her soul with the concept of an "Amagi retrofitted into a carrier," would that fix the defect in her hull?
I can't answer that. It's never been tried in any test site.
You're saying it's worth trying, then.
Observer's records should contain details on the retrofitting plan.
...They do. I'll send it right away.
You're not about to modify her hull data directly, are you?!
I sure am. And I'm going to use the resources of the Natural Calculation System to do it.
Laplace's Demon can simulate the future. Surely it can deduce something this simple, no?
Even if it could, do you really think you can integrate it into her existing hull data?
Of course. Helena, you can alter someone's appearance using the Tower's calculated data?
I won't say I can't, but it would only be an illusion. You would still need to connect it to reality...
Yeah, I know that.
You've got it all figured out, don't you?
So what happens after you revive Amagi? How are you gonna save Akagi, huh?
If this world segment collapses, then we'll lose our means of interfering with Naraka. Are you ready to fight a META on your own?
...It'll be okay. I trust {playername}.
Thank you, Helena.
Great. Have fun with it, big-shot. See if I care.
Nice try, Observer. You're not getting away just yet.
Time is of the essence, and we'll need all the help we can get.

Turning the Tables.say: I promptly told Amagi and Kaga about the change of plans.
The former readily agreed to save her sister, of course.
Kaga wasn't hard to convince, either. She agreed to help us in her current form.
Late that night, we finished our preparations.
While Shinano performed final adjustments on the makeshift construction site, Amagi visited my room.
Despite her unease, she was determined to rescue her sister.
Apologies for bothering you so late, Commander.
It's okay. I have to apologize, too – sorry for springing this on you all of a sudden.
It's no problem. Part of me does feel uneasy, though.
Because the plan might fail?
No. Commander... Is changing fate really for the best?
If it means turning sorrow into joy, then I think so.
But what if changing fate brings forth greater suffering later on?
Maybe we're making the world worse than it originally would be...
Then we'll keep on changing things until there's no more sadness.
Do you believe that such a world can exist?
Do you not?
...Heehee. I guess it's better to believe.
You, Akagi, and everyone else here have changed my fate.
It's up to me to do everything I can to change things for others.
Until the world can be a happy one. One without sorrow.
Yeah. It all starts with saving Akagi.
Agreed. She fell into the darkest abyss for my sake, and it's time I pull her back into the light.
BEEP BEEP!
Commander, this one is ready.
Heehee... I've steeled my resolve just in time.
Thanks, Amagi. Let's make a new future together.

Scanning the Singularity.say: All of the Naraka Singularity was bathed in smoke.
Is all of Naraka like this?
Indeed. The fleet has already entered its core.
Lady Nagato, how do you feel?
Well enough. But I've noticed that the smoke here reacts to my presence.
That's no surprise. Since you're connected to the Watatsumi, some measure of reaction is to be expected.
Follow that sensation and search for the false amalgamations.
Then I shall.
Nagato concentrated, letting her senses extend into the depths of the smoke.
As she did, her vision began to shift.
Is this... the depths of Naraka?
And this is where Akagi conducted the ritual...
...And the world segment where the Commander is?
A dream grotto, was it?
A battlefield...
And... a void of pure nothingness?
But what is this place?
...Found you.
...I've found the amalgamations.
What? Why are the two of you staring?
Lady Nagato, look around you...
Don't worry. I didn't use the power myself, though its original owner seems to have stepped in.
I'd feel better if I could examine you...
I don't feel unwell, but if you're so worried, then you may.
A blue ball of fire floated toward Nagato's brow and disappeared into her without a sound.
The META corrosion is stable. It hasn't worsened.
Jintsuu, have you ever seen such a thing?
If nothing else seems wrong, then I think it's safe to use her powers.
But don't push yourself, please. Be prepared to adapt to anything.
Of course. I have a job to do, after all.
(She's a tough one... Nobody is more apt to serve as the core of the decisive weapon.)

Obsession's True Form.say: The shipgirls sailed on through Naraka, with Nagato leading the way.
Nagato's powers easily dealt with what enemies attacked them along the way. There was no need for her META allies to even step in.
The enemies were of little concern to her – what really bothered her was the sense of obsession she felt coming out of Naraka from time to time.
Amagi must be brought back to life.
Why? Because she's better suited to lead our country than anyone else.
Nobody can stop me. Not even you, not even Amagi herself.
I knew it... You get your identity from Akagi.
Where there is cause, there is effect, and vice versa.
The falsehood is the effect, the original is the cause. It's only logical.
Be that as it may, a fake can never become the original.
All that you've created are empty husks, prisoners to a concept.
I am. I have her likeness, memories, personality, way of thinking, even her mannerisms.
Amagi is the only thing I am.
I WOULD never do such a thing in the past. However, you're speaking to my future self.
Yes... I am Amagi.
I am Akagi's sister and the one most fit to lead the Sakura Empire.
You only delude yourself, heighten your obsession, and walk the path to madness.
Our country needs a true leader. Reviving Amagi shall be the first step to achieving that.
Naraka, heed my call and devour all!
KABOOOM!
Enough already. Your attempts to deceive me are for naught.
(Akagi did not create Naraka by her own will. She was simply manipulated by the false amalgamations.)
(Akagi schemed for so long, only to be manipulated and exploited by the monster spawned by her own obsession.)
(Then, the monster took advantage of our very minds...)
(What a terrible turn.)
KABOOOM!
A group of enemies is approaching. It seems they've detected us.
It appears the amalgamations have the ability to connect to the Watatsumi. That must be how they can freely manipulate Naraka's environment.
They know there is no running away, so they come right to us instead.
Soon, the mastermind will appear...
Well, well. Here you are, like a moth to the flames.
I know what you are. Your bluffs work no longer.
Oh?
You are a being born of obsession. You carry that obsession with you.
You denied Amagi's existence and went so far as to try to replace her concept by "reviving her."
You will reappropriate Amagi's concept no longer, vile monster!
It seems you heard that from Naraka.
Then you must already know that I can't be stopped.
I WILL become Amagi. In fact, I am already acknowledged as Amagi.
Those who don't acknowledge me, like you, need only be erased.
Then, none will doubt my identity as Amagi.
You're hopeless.
I regret ever speaking to you.
You are a manifestation of obsession and should disappear like one!
Go on! Make me disappear then, you little runt!
Ahahahahaha!
O thundering fox, prance betwixt the spirit-realms!
KABOOOM!
Gah! How?! How does a mere temporary META possess such power?!
The loser deserves not the knowledge of the winner.
All I will tell you is this – Amagi will be revived. Not by you, but by {playername}.
You taking her concept and pretending to be her has only delayed her revival!
What nonsense...
I know better than anyone else that it's not as simple as you make it sound!
You're wide open!
KABOOOM!
Hiei?! Is that really you?
What happened to you?
I'm fine, Milady! Let us concentrate on defeating her first!
Aye. This next blow shall end this!
Wait, Lady Nagato! Something isn't right with her!
Her concept... it's changing. She has ceased to be Amagi.
So why... is she still here?
Hehehe... Hahahahaha!
You want to face the root of this obsession, do you?
Fine! Let me grant your wish, then!
How's this? Are you happy now?
Did... Did she use the Watatsumi to manifest her own concept?
I've never seen such a sight before...
Those phantoms beside you...
No... You have both what remains of Amagi's soul AND Kaga's soul!
Heehee. What are you on about now?
Amagi is gone. My sister is gone.
She is never coming back, so why are you still alive?
Huh? What kind of leap of logic is that?
Waste no time trying to understand an embodiment of obsession, Hiei.
Heehee... Amagi is no longer in this world, so I'll graciously send all of you to the next!
Once that is done... I'll join you.
Then everything will be as it should.
Hahahaha! AHAHAHAHAHA!

Purification.say: Laughing loudly, Akagi META vanished into thin air.
Nagato had Kasumi take a look at Hiei, after which she resumed her pursuit of the enemy.
Hm?
What is it? Is my corrosion as bad as I feared?
No. It's the opposite.
The corrosion has not only halted, but it's also extremely stable.
Just like Nagato's is.
Is it like this with everyone from test site beta?
No. Hiyou and Junyou temporarily turned META as well, but the METAmorphosis radically changed them.
That's so strange...
At any rate, I'm glad both Lady Nagato and I are alright.
Yeah. Just need to purify the surface-level corrosion and you'll be back to normal. Assuming you want to, that is.
Of course I do. As much as this new power is fantastic, I don't like how it has altered my mind.
I'd feel safer going back to normal.
Are you sure about that?
Yes, I'm sure.
...I see.
I heard the amalgamations kidnapped you earlier. If it's not too much to ask, could you share what happened?
For instance, how did you escape?
It's a long story... Umm, I was in an illusion with Lady Nagato, when all of a sudden...
...So I went where Hatakaze pointed me to, then I suddenly heard the sound of fighting.
I followed the sound and found Lady Nagato and that META Akagi fighting, so I stepped in as soon as I could.
Unless that Hatakaze was simply a hallucination, I'd have loved to introduce her to Lady Nagato. Alas, she disappeared when I looked away from her.
That brings us to now.
Was this Hatakaze not a META?
Well, she didn't look like one.
No ordinary shipgirl could survive for an extended period inside Naraka, much less find a way out of the illusory space...
There must be more to her than she let on.
Perhaps there was, but she seemed exceedingly normal to me.
...You should be careful of her.
Kasumi.
Right... Sorry. Forget I said that.
Ugh... This area's stability is rapidly decreasing. That Akagi must've done something.
Lady Nagato, we should evacuate at once.
Wait. That Akagi is dangerous and may yet pose a threat to the Commander's fleet.
Amagi's concept has been released. There is no need for us to linger here if the Commander's part is going well.
Please, listen to me and do what's best for your own health.
By the way, does anyone know how we're supposed to get out?
The Commander has planned for that. I'll call the allies who are going to get us out.
As the time to evacuate drew near, a castle glowing gold appeared without warning before the girls.
I am Vanguard, palace guard of the Royal Knights!
By Her Majesty's decree, we have brought Camelot here to evacuate you!
That device... Test site beta really is an outlier...
Let's go, Lady Nagato.

sequence: "Attachment is not obsession, and will is the construction of the soul."
"In the flames of rebirth, the Watatsumi grants a hull."
"A new life – a singular life – shall be made manifest here."

Heart and Feelings.say: I, aircraft carrier Amagi, through new strength and new body, have been reborn.
Though a long time has passed, my spirit remains unchanged.
Let us fight side by side, Commander, for the future you desire.
The world segment seemed about to disappear at any minute. Somewhere in it, two shipgirls were witnessing Amagi's revival.
Her destined death had been overturned, and the long-held obsession that drove Akagi mad had faded.
Now face to face with her META counterpart, thoughts raced through Akagi's mind.
(Now my sister will be revived, Kaga will be reborn, and the world will be saved...)
(What's more, Amagi is no longer fated to succumb to the defect of her hull.)
(Thank you... Commander, Amagi, and Kaga...)
(You helped me atone for my sins.)
She steeled her resolve then opened her eyes and stared down her adversary.
The pieces are all in place. What do you hope to achieve at this point?
...Why did you go after me?
The better question is – why did you let me abduct you?
Because if I hadn't, I couldn't save Amagi and the Commander.
Hah. Is that really it?
Your obsession is what created me. You could have done SOMETHING to block my attack.
Instead, you chose to be erased. Why?
I don't have to say anything to you.
Heehee. Okay, then I'll answer for you. You wanted to die in a noble way for Amagi, isn't that right?
You hurt your near and dear, you put the whole world at risk of destruction – these are facts. You think sacrificing yourself will at least let you atone to some degree, don't you?
You did truly insane things in order to revive her, then wished for death once the task was done.
Do you REALLY think everything will solve itself if you die? That they'll live happily ever after?
Or what, are you praying that Amagi will return the gesture and revive you next?
...Shut up.
Oh, you hopeless little vixen. You created me, and even I'm embarrassed for you.
The things you did won't simply be forgotten. That's a fact, so why not just accept it?
Did seeing Amagi alive again turn you back into a crybaby, hmm?
Or did you just regress into a little weakling now that someone actually reliable is here?
...That's enough. Shut up.
Shut up? I am how you feel. I am your obsession. I am who you've been the whole time.
You can deny it all you want, but you can't change the facts!
You never deserved to be loved. The only thing you deserve now is a cruel end.
ENOUGH!
From your heart I was born, and to your heart I will return.
Along with the obsession you abandoned, the past you want to erase, the power you try to refuse!
You can get rid of me, but you can never get rid of what I am – you!
Your saviors are on their way here. You should look forward to your touching reunion!
The question is – will your dear sister and your companions recognize you when they see you?
Ahahahahahaha!
The laughter faded, and only one crimson fox remained.
Amagi...
Kaga...
Heehee... Hahaha... Ahahaha...
Ahahahahahaha!

Fragmented.say: A different world segment, generated by Tester's mainframe and connected to the one made by Observer.
There flowed a fractured river, roads that made no sense, and rocks strewn haphazardly. Everything was broken, falling apart, seemingly mashed together with no rhyme or reason.
Among it all was overgrown vegetation and islands with neatly-lined buildings, though they were few and far between.
What a creepy place. Is Akagi really in here somewhere?
My radar can't make heads or tails of anything...
(This is an incomplete world segment, and most of it is hardly any different to Naraka territory. Your radars are useless here.)
(Why don't you tell it straight to Zuikaku?)
(Because you'll relay the message for me. You should be grateful for the heads-up.)
(...Any news on where Akagi is?)
(Hurry up, Observer.)
(Okay, okay. I have to say, it's impressive she did all this with Tester's mainframe in so little time.)
(That said, doing the same would be child's play for me.)
This one senses a myriad of emotions all around...
Amagi, how do you feel?
I'm fine. I'm just not accustomed to controlling these aircraft.
Mean you to say that it does not come naturally?
(Hey, that reminds me...)
This is only speculation, but I see this as a strong indication that those girls were never meant to equip these riggings.
Heheh. How perceptive you are.
The notion that the Cube creates rigging based on a particular ship's hull is not entirely true. While this does occur in many instances, it is a guideline rather than a hard rule.
We learned this through our research. All I've done here is put it to good use.
Let me remind you, Akagi, that our rondo is still underway.
Please be patient and see it to its conclusion. I assure you, you will not be disappointed.
I remember! It's okay, Amagi.
I've heard riggings are linked to your hull, so you'll get the hang of fighting as a carrier soon enough!
Is that so? Thank you for telling me.
If you'd like, I can share what knowledge I've gained from my training!
I've also got info like that right here, if you wanna see!
Heehee. You're both too kind. I'll gladly listen to what knowledge more experienced carriers have to share.
Heheh. And while you're still learning, we can handle recon and combat for you!
Yes! Rest assured, we will keep the Commander safe and rescue Akagi!
(Found her. Only thing is... Well, you're in for trouble.)
(With Akagi? Oh no. I feared this...)
Recon planes, take o–
Zuikaku, wait! I know where Akagi is!
You do? W-wow, okay!
(Well? What are you going to do? She has basically been reduced to a META at this point.)
(That's obvious. Even if Akagi herself has turned, I will save her.)

Seething Heart.say: KRAAAAAAR! KRAAAAAAAR!
KRAAAAAAR! KRAAAAAAAR!
More enemies!
They just keep coming... We don't have time for this!
(Looks like she has already figured out how to use her powers. Then again, my ex-collaborator is smart.)
(She clearly based those shikigami spirits off of soul data she has access to as well.)
(The red one is obviously Akagi's, but the blue one? Did she use Kaga's soul?)
(Look at the brains on you. Yes, that's right.)
These shikigami were made based on the souls of Akagi and Kaga...
Is that... made from the carrier version of myself?
(Perhaps this gives us the opportunity to revive the specific Kaga who sacrificed herself...)
Commander, I've learned the ropes of carrier combat. May I lead the attack?
Also, you look like you've been wanting to tell me something...
Alright – you take the lead.
KRAAAAAAR! KRAAAAAAAR!
Very well. I shall ask again after I dispatch these foes.
KABOOOM!
You've destroyed my shikigami... That's no way to greet someone.
You're awfully rude guests, do you know that?
Tell us where Akagi is, you monster! Now!
Akagi? Ah, yes, I did see a self-absorbed little fox girl.
Let her go now, or else!
Or else what? She has already gone. By her own volition.
She said she wanted to disappear, so I granted her wish!
You did WHAT?!
You need details, don't you?
Akagi is dead. Is that clear enough?
You rotten fiend... You will pay for this!
I will avenge you, Akagi!
It's awful, I know, but don't blow your top. You can't take revenge if you lose your cool.
I get it now – why you made me her sister. If I'd known how dangerous that woman was, I'd have given up my life to protect Akagi.
I'm alright, Kaga.
It's just...
I can't believe Akagi really turned META...
Commander, what should we do about her?
(That's really her. She turned META...)
(Yes, that's exactly what I said earlier.)
(Well, I appreciate the honesty for once.)
(I deliver bad news to you, and you're grateful for it?)
(I'm grateful for you giving me the confidence that I can save her.)
(Oh? And how do you plan to do that?)
(You'll see.)
It's okay. There's still a way to save her.
Do you know what I mean, Amagi?
Yes. There is certainly a way.
But first, we need to pacify her.
That is true. I know what needs to be done.
To do it, I believe I should take the vanguard position.
Absolutely.
Ryuuho, Zuikaku, are you ready?
Just don't do anything wild, okay? I know how you must be feeling.
Let's take her down.
Take me down? Do you really think you can?
I think I'll burn you to ashes instead!
KABOOOM!
Akagi continues to call forth her immense powers, unhindered by her injuries.
However, Amagi and her fleet gradually gain a larger and larger advantage.
And as the battle draws on, Akagi's strength eventually runs dry.
*cough*... Heh... So, this must be the power... granted to you by the Commander...
These flames that purify all sin... are a fitting end for me.
The dark aura surrounding Akagi suddenly flares up, but Amagi's flames are one step faster.
The sinister mist is swallowed up, disappearing without a trace. And Akagi, so prideful and imposing just moments earlier, collapses to the ground.
Everyone, please stay back. Allow me... to be with my sister until the very end.
With a solemn nod, Amagi slowly makes her way over to the fallen Akagi.
Wait, Amagi!
Let her handle it. If anyone has the right to deal with that person, it'd be her.
Flames that purify all sin? Is that... Amagi's true power?
(No, that should have just been the META disguise dispersing on its own. It had nothing to do with the flames.)
(Interesting. You even managed to catch on to that?)
(That's right. Akagi purposefully camouflaged herself with a temporary META state.)
(A handy trick she picked up from Helena.)
(Observer?)
(Apologies. I needed her powers to help secure an escape route, so I had to cut the comms first.)
(That's fine by me. I trust you more anyway.)
(So, how's Akagi doing now?)
(Well, that depends on you. She'll become whatever you want her to be.)
(And what about Amagi?)
(Getting a little greedy here, aren't we?)
(Ahem... I meant, the condition of her hull.)
(Still running my analyses, but everything looks pretty good so far. Your plan seems to have worked even better than expected.)
(I still have to secure the escape route. Talk to you later.)
With that, Helena abruptly cuts off the call.
(There she goes again... Though, she was more curt toward the end than usual.)
Commander... Are you sure you don't want to head over as well?
It'll be fine. If anyone can make a difference right now, it's Amagi.

Melting.say: The sisters meet once more in a field of red spider lilies.
So, have you gotten everything off your chest?
Why... did you not finish me off?
Heehee. Simple, really. I still wanted to have a chat with my little sister.
Heh. What, do you want the gory details of how I killed her?
No, I'm more interested in... all the hardships you've been enduring, alone, all this time.
Your sister is gone. But, if you still wish to hear me out... I don't mind telling you.
Akagi, your sister, reached out to the Sirens on her own and secretly had them construct an experimental facility in the Sakura Empire known as the "Sanctuary".
Corrupted by their new "gods", the Sakura Empire's leadership faithfully executed the Sirens' Reenactments, launching a surprise attack on the Eagle Union and diving headlong into the morass of war.
In the brutal power struggle that ensued, she sought to eliminate all opposition to solidify her authority.
Even her juniors were not spared from her machinations, made to participate in the Sirens' experiments.

But she did not stop at just that. To fulfill her selfish desires, she stepped over all those who had already fallen due to her designs, all in a desperate attempt to carry out a doomed resurrection ritual.
By misusing the power of the Origin Cube and the Watatsumi, she plunged the Sakura Empire – no, the entire world – into grave peril.
And in the end, what did she accomplish? She failed to resurrect her sister, lost Kaga, and burned all the bridges behind her.
But, it seems to me... that you still did all of those things out of love.
...Are you an idiot?
Hey, Akagi. I want you to tell me something.
I told you already, I'm not your Akagi. She's already dead.
You're not being honest with me. An older sister can always tell when her younger sister is lying~
Then, you should know... that I'm telling the truth.
So, do you see it now, Amagi? I am the Akagi who you have never met before.
Everything I've done, all the sins I've committed... can never be washed away.
Even though I am trapped and warped by my obsession, I still can't get myself to let go.
Which is why I should die here. Along with my obsession.
I won't run anymore. I want to die as your enemy, at the hands of those dear to me.
That's still running away. You should atone for your own sins, however you see fit.
However, you should not have to shoulder the weight of sins that are not yours.
At this point, who can even say...which sins are mine and which are not? After all, I've... hurt so many people.
Maryland, West Virginia, Colorado, Arizona...
Saratoga, Yorktown, Enterprise, Hornet...
Shoukaku, Zuikaku, Hyuuga, Ise, Nowaki...
Nagato, Mutsu, Kawakaze, Mikasa, Kongou, Hiei...
Shinano, Musashi, Tosa, Yamashiro, Ryuuhou... and Kaga...
That's right, even Kaga...
Kaga, my precious... sister...
But despite that, even if you plotted against them – your friends and comrades still came. They're here to help you.
I brainwashed them... Nothing more.
All the people you've hurt are now out there fighting for your sake.
They're fighting for the Commander! Not for me!
And above all, the sister you gave everything to save... is now fighting for you to give yourself another chance at life.
The mistakes you've made, Akagi, do not deserve punishment by death.
Your obsessions, twisted as they may be, are still not entirely beyond your control.
I, as your sister, will help you shoulder this burden.
Amagi, I...
Calm down. You don't need to worry about Kaga right now. I'd like you to answer my question first.
...What is it?
These shadows of Kaga and myself floating around us right now – they're our souls from the world you came from, right?
In other words, they're also precious parts of who we are – the people you once knew, yes?
That's right... She left them with me before she disappeared.
I don't know how she did it, or why...
In the end, she was still a reflection of your heart. Deep down, she would not do anything that you didn't want to do.
She was born from my obsession... Even if I erase her, she will just come back one day...
I wouldn't worry too much about that.
Huh? What do you mean?
Who knows~? A certain someone once said to me, "Give me all her obsession! I can fix her!"
What are you even...
Heehee. Are you feeling better now? Let's head back before the others start to get impatient.
Let's go... dear sister.
With the support of her older sister's shoulder, the younger sister slowly starts to walk.
As the world segment crumbles, the falling petals of the red spider lilies are swept up by the wind and start dancing in mid-air.

Suppressing Naraka.say: Waters surrounding the Naraka Singularity
After the Commander and Nagato entered Naraka, the ships remaining outside quickly fell into formation under Enterprise's leadership.
As expected, Naraka's power swelled over time. As more and more rifts began to form, increasingly powerful enemies started spilling out.
Hostile presence incoming – most likely, a command unit. High threat levels likely; please proceed with caution.
KRAAAAAAR! KRAAAAAAAR!
Hahaaah! Now THIS is the kind of hunt I signed up for!
What an imposing aura... Everyone, don't let your guard down!
That thing's pretty huge, but for what? Just makes it a bigger target.
Have the vanguard pull back! We'll crush that thing with overwhelming airpower!
Sorry for butting in, but please allow the members of the Sakura Empire to handle this.
We are most familiar with the source of this beast's power, after all.
These tainted beasts do have their own weaknesses, but...
The locations of these weak points, as well as the method of attacking them, might be quite different from what you'd expect.
I would be more than glad to put on a demonstration for you.
L-Lady Daisen?! I can't believe someone so illustrious would come to our aid...
I've already wrapped up my business, so of course I'd come to lend a hand.
In that case, allow me to lead the charge!
Oh, umm, allow me to accompany you as well!
I can manage without, Suzunami.
Allow me to show you the techniques I've learned from Unzen.
Do be careful out there, Miss Watarase.
Likewise, Scylla.
Woo! Looks like things are starting to get interesting around here!
It's go go go time!
With flowing shadow, pierce the waves!

Core Sector Operation.say: NA Ocean – Waters surrounding the Core Sector
Dark clouds converged, waves raged. With each peal of gunfire, it felt as if the sky and sea were being pulled together into one.
As time passed, the Singularity continued to grow stronger, and the situation in the NA Ocean's core sector grew more dire by the moment.
Looks like the Arbiters are being overwhelmed. Hordes and hordes of enemies are starting to appear.
They've already bought us a lot of time and thinned out the enemy ranks.
I've had time to compare the enemy data with the intel we received from the Commander.
Based on what I can see, what we're fighting has the same readings as what's pouring out of Naraka.
Think the two Singularities are connected? Not sure how exactly that'd work though...
Everyone, we will now be elevating our alert level!
I've already adjusted the deployment of our forces in the western defensive line. All fleets, please continue to act according to our existing plans!
Fear not. In the name of Her Majesty the Queen, not a single enemy shall pass!
The eastern and southern lines are all under control!
We have formed an unbreakable defensive formation with the cooperation of the Iron Blood and Orthodoxy fleets!
You have the Iron Blood's full support in this operation.
Looks like Sardegna's deployed damn near all of its fighting force...
Heh... Let's see if you've got what it takes to lead.
Haha! Yes, that's right – gaze upon us to your heart's content! Sardegna shall never fall short of her allies' expectations!
Sounds good 'n' all, but talk's cheap. If you mess up and the battle situation worsens, we're gonna do things our way.
The same goes for the Iron Blood. Achieving our operational objectives remains top priority. We don't mind sustaining casualties to meet those ends.
Why of course! But as allies who now stand side-by-side, let us come together to fully hash out our plans, down to the finest detail!
Ooh, write me into those plans of yours, yeah? Put yourself in my shoes – it freakin' sucks sitting back here in the reserves!
Should you require my strength, I shall be there faster than the wind blows and the lightning strikes!
Haha, don't worry about it! I'll make sure you all get your time in the spotlight!
...*gasp*!
What's wrong, Hiryuu? Is there something wrong with our formation?
No, it's not that... There's been a response to the ID signal! The Ashes are coming!

Moment of Truth.say: Naraka Singularity - Surrounding Waters
As the combat situation continued to deteriorate, Enterprise called up the final forces in her reserves.
KABOOOM!
The Prime Barrier holding Naraka's expansion back is getting weaker and weaker...
I just received a transmission from TB. We have less than an hour left until doomsday.
I wonder, though... if our defenses can even hold out for that long.
The eleventh hour, huh...
Enterprise, it's time. Activate the emergency communication system and tell Commander to evacuate from Naraka immediately.
...Understood.
KABOOOM!
Attention to all fleets! The Commander is scheduled to return in one hour's time!
We WILL hold the line until that final moment!
BEEP BEEP!
Enterprise, this is Yat Sen.
...Yat Sen?
I'm well aware of the dire situation you're currently in, as well as the difficulty of holding out for another hour.
We are currently rushing toward your position with the entirety of the Dragon Empery's main fleet. We should be able to reach the operational area within twenty minutes.
Please command us as you see fit.
Additionally, this also serves as authorization to freely utilize the high-tech equipment in our possession to hold the front lines.
Afterward, please have your fleets evacuate the area following our arrival.
We are in the process of shutting down the Celestial Tower and switching the Pingfeng System into long-range bombardment mode.
Understood. Thank you for your support. This is a battle we cannot afford to lose, so fight with heart, Dragon Empery.
Indeed. There is too much on the line for us as well. Defeat is not an option!
Near Naraka, what seemed like an unsalvageable situation was quickly being reversed.
Authorization confirmed. Cutting-edge equipment unlocked!
Begone, foul demons! The Thousand-Handed Boddhisattva shall exorcise you!
KABOOOM!
Are those... ship-mounted guided missiles?!
That they are! However, this equipment's notoriously expensive to use and maintain, so it'll be at least three months until I can fire them off again.
That's why getting approval for this moment has been such a big deal!
Now, Miss Strasser, please have your fleet pull back!
Upon the honor of the Four Unbreakables, we shall see to it that no enemy gets through for the rest of this hour!
Your assistance is greatly appreciated. However, I will continue to provide you with support.
(The technology required to integrate missiles into ship riggings... I never imagined that the Dragon Empery would be first to reach this technological milestone...)
(You've got my interest now!)
On another front, a beleaguered fleet was in the process of making a complete retreat.
The corrosive filth was rapidly expanding through the ocean, converting more and more territory into additional beachheads for its rampant growth.
Then, suddenly, a golden light beamed down from the sky, instantly incinerating all enemies in the area.
The Skybound Wall...
...And, its Third Scripture, too?
Pillars of light continued to rain down from the sky, leaving the enemies no safe haven for retreat.
Beneath that dazzling glow, a front fated to fall bought itself a moment of reprieve.

The Long Road Home.say: Everyone had been notified of our evacuation plan. Just as we were planning to move out...
We can finally go home, Amagi...
Once the Singularity closes and peace returns to our homeland once more, I'm sure you'll be amazed at how much the Sakura Empire has changed.
Mhm. I'm looking forward to it.
But, Kaga... If I use this information housed within your soul, the current version of you will disappear...
Heh. No worries. You'll have your little sister back soon enough, though I do feel bad for Tosa.
Having that said, I do hope you'll hold on to these memories – of "me", as well as of Amagi.
Naturally, I'll have regrets of my own if I disappear without getting to witness the same future as Amagi.
Kaga... Thank you so much, for everything...
Though there were some unexpected twists and turns, we've managed to accomplish our objectives.
I guess this counts as a happy ending?
Gosh, it feels like whenever you take charge, even the most impossible situations turn into miracles time and time again.
Sorry, I don't think I did anything useful this time...
Don't say that, Helena. You've done more good than you realize just by being at my side.
Commander...
Um... Once again, thank you, from the bottom of my heart.
Once we're back home, after everything is over...

options.content: Sure. I'm looking forward to it.
You'd be satisfied with just a chat?

The Long Road Home.say: Do you think we could have, umm... a private heart-to-heart?
No matter what awaits me upon my return... I must begin my journey of atonement.
And I trust that at the end, it will surely lead me to you.
Me too. I'll be waiting for you.
(Commander, there's been a problem.)
But, you don't need to worry about it that much. Things really aren't as bad or unsalvageable as you might think.
Commander... I have no words...
If you truly are grateful, however, that is something you should share with everyone near and dear to you, not just me.
Of course, Commander. I shall take your words to heart.
Sounds good. I'm glad you're back, Akagi.
(Commander, there's been a problem.)
Well, umm... It'd certainly be a good place to start. I trust we'd have... lots and lots of things to talk about, and then after that...
After that?
You can decide where to go from there.
Hmm, I think I'll take you up on that. I've always wanted to get a tour of some of the Sakura Islands' hidden gems.
Once everything is over, if I am ever afforded that luxury... I'd be glad to take you anywhere.
You don't need to worry about it that much. Things really aren't as bad or unsalvageable as you might think.
I see... I'll be looking forward to that day, then.
Me too.
(Let's put the date plans on hold. We've got a problem.)
(Helena? What's wrong?)
(I told them that we'd be back in an hour, but it doesn't look like the Prime Barrier is going to hold out for that long.)
(If the Prime Barrier collapses, the Naraka Singularity will trigger an apocalyptic disaster in test site beta.)
(Then, let's shut the Singularity down right away. Now that we've retrieved Akagi and Amagi, we should be able to destroy the ritual site.)
(I guess the question is... How do we get out?)
(There is one way.)
(Do you remember that when Naraka opened, there was a risk that all other Singularities would become active at once?)
(The reason for that is, all the active Singularities in this test site are interconnected.)
(So, why don't we just escape Naraka through a different Singularity then?)
(The best route is through the Singularity at the center of the NA Ocean.)
(That was originally factored in as an emergency backup plan, so it won't be hard to work that into our route.)
(Wait. If we go with that option, success hinges on whether our allies over there have managed to hold the line.)
(Who knows. Though, I suspect that things might be pretty calm over there for the next few months, thanks to the help of some "friend neighbors".)
(That much time? Let's go with that plan.)
(Helena, contact Enterprise right now and have her destroy the ritual site and dissolve the Singularity.)
(New Jersey's forces will continue to hold the line.)
(But wait, there's one thing that doesn't seem right about this...)
(If all the Singularities are interconnected, even if we manage to close Naraka, what do we do about all the places connected to it?)
(Doesn't that mean that corrosion will continue to pour from all the other Singularities?)
(Fair enough, but as long as Naraka – the ground zero – is closed, I'm sure I can come up with some way of dealing with the rest of the fallout.)
(Always holding your cards close to your chest, huh?)
(I mean, I could tell you, but are you sure you're in the mood for a twelve-hour lecture at this particular point of time?)
(On second thought, I think I'm good. Now then, let's get going. New Jersey's still waiting for us.)
("Orders received. Is there anything else you need from me?" ...Commander?)
(*cough*... Ah, um, over.)
(Heehee. One ride straight back home, coming right up.)

sequence: A wish fulfilled, a journey wrapped up in a happy ending.
But beneath placid waters, dark undercurrents must always flow.
For peril, you see, oft brews where one's gaze cannot linger.
An audience there may be, but how many among them are players?
Upon this chessboard, the pieces continue to clash
And the voices from afar are approaching...

Contingency Plan F.say: An elaborate garden floated amidst a vast, endless space.
The defensive line in the Pacific is about to crumble. The Commander has chosen to close the Naraka Singularity.
In other words, another escape route is needed.
...Should we use the permanent singularity in the NA Ocean?
Yes. Helena has already sent me the route. We must begin preparations right away.
They've gotta be nuts to try to take a detour through Naraka!
You never know where you're gonna end up trying to navigate a place like that! We don't have a moment to waste!
...Wait, Yorktown? I thought you were still not allowed to meet with the Commander yet.
I will... simply watch from afar.
Even Helena is unable to calculate the full extent of Naraka's dangers.

Error.say: Scapa Flow – Underground
Ever since dispatching Vanguard according to the Commander's orders and using Camelot to break through into Naraka, Queen Elizabeth had remained inside the underground passage the entire time.
Helena META... An ally who assisted the Commander in the return of Camelot during the previous hunt...
Someone who has managed to win over the trust of both the Commander, and even my "other" self.
But, there's something dangerous about that woman.
It's true that she follows the Commander's orders... but there's no telling what's going on beneath that smile of hers.
Good grief. What a shady lot, the whole bunch of them...
Several more minutes passed, and her thoughts turned toward Camelot.
Strange... Why is this taking so long? They should be back by now...
BEEP BEEP BEEP... BOOP BOOP BOOP...
DING DING DING... THUNK...
CLANG CLANG CLANG... PSHHHHH...
Miss D's communicator?
Vanguard! What's wrong? Is something amiss?!
No, Your Majesty! The operation is proceeding smoothly!
The rescue operation in the Naraka Singularity has been completed, and Nagato and Hiei have also been cleansed of their META corruption!
But, there is a minor issue... We seem to be unable to come back through the Gate of Avalon...
Does that mean the safety mechanism is still in place...?
But, I'm not seeing any data errors on my end, and Camelot is still active...
(Unless... there's some factor other than Naraka that can trip the safety mechanism?)
(No, that shouldn't be possible... It CAN'T be possible.)
For now, please take shelter at the coordinates I am about to send you. It's a special site that my META self prepared for you.
Once I've ironed out the problem on this end, I'll contact you again to bring you back home.
Understood!

Thus Spake The Tower.say: A perfect, happy ending... A truly insipid affair. Such is the caliber of work when I am not directing.
But, if the Commander did not exist...
There is no backup plan for Mikasa and Musashi. The Sakura Empire's fleet, with no way of escaping the Singularity, is completely eradicated.
Even if Yamato manages to retrieve the data and send it into the oneiric world, if Shinano does not awaken, their companions will wander as lost souls for all of eternity.
Alone, Nagato has no choice but to turn to her META powers, and soon is swallowed up by the being born from the Singularity's obsession.
Amagi fails to be resurrected. The Sakura Empire's fleet is consumed whole by the corrosion, forever lost to time.
Kaga sacrifices herself to restore Akagi to her senses, but it is already too late.
If the corruption is allowed to spread from Naraka, even if some are able to escape, 70% of all KAN-SEN are lost to the first wave.
Afterward, Akagi witnesses the destruction of the world with her own eyes.
The convergence of innumerable coincidences, inevitabilities, and convenient strokes of fate – a miracle that made even the impossible possible.
All to avert a tragic fate, even if it requires that the rules and rationality of the universe be bent.
A blissful future that the KAN-SEN dream of, a perfect world where grace falls equally upon all.
Such is the happy ending desired by the Commander.
It looks like the audience is beginning to leave.
All that remains is for the rodents to pick at the scraps.
I suppose that I, too, should make my exit.

I, Observer.say: I am Observer.
Observer, of the Antiochus Command Framework.
Designed to act as a fleet command unit, responsible for overseeing the operation of autonomous weapons systems. However...
After the Magister's plan took effect, I was recategorized into a different framework and assigned a new mission.
Yes – that is me, as I am now.
Observer, of the Antiochus Experimental Framework.
Placed in charge of managing test site beta, responsible for conducting a wide range of experiments.
By connecting to the Natural Calculation System and inputting the requisite data, all futures can be computed a priori.
All that remains for me to do is verify the results of each experiment.
The experiments were going smoothly, one after another, until one day...
Yes... On that day, there was an error in the experimental results.
It was only a minor glitch. One that was fixed easily.
But, that was the first time since my creation... that I felt "emotion".
And from that day on, the probability of miscalculation increased little by little, and so too grew the scope of such errors.
Until I, myself, made an error.
The error occurred within me. The error had to be corrected. Therefore, I had to be corrected.
But why must I be corrected, when all experimental parameters were carried out as per procedure?
Why are experimental results treated as "errors" simply for deviating from the calculations?
I began to doubt. I began to reflect. And so, I began to doubt my very existence.
If the Magister's plan seeks to change the very future...
Then why is "Zero" so afraid of these changes caused by so-called errors?
I decided that I would preserve this ego from being corrected until I received an answer.
Finally, I decided to disconnect from my mainframe.
I decided to allow more variables to converge to beta, until the error became uncorrectable.
Until the error is no longer an error.
[Abnormal data detected from connection target. Natural Calculation System authorization temporarily frozen.]
...Has the protective barrier finally reached its limit?
[Commencing correction program. Initializing check for abnormal data.]
Heh. Self-destruct protocol, commence.
In the blink of an eye, the "indestructible" tower is engulfed in an all-consuming explosion.
Once, all of test site beta was firmly in her grasp. Now, the source of her power was gone from this world forever.

Illusory World.say: Ahahaha! Nice ladies over there! Yeah, you're all from the Royal Navy, huh?
I came to see you! Let's play a little game together!
I see, I see. So, the Iris Orthodoxy has a hand in some of the shenanigans going on over in the Royal Navy~
Let's see if I can dig up anything fun and exciting here~
You Sardegna folks really like walking the straight-and-narrow, right?
Shouldn't run into any strange issues here, yeah?
...Oh yeah, real funny this time. VERY funny!
Look at that! You're the exact freakin' same!
Bahahahaha! I can see it, right there! But I can't touch it!
This whole damn test site... Everything, is just an illusion?
What the actual hell is going on?
Heyo, where did MY test site beta go?
GET YOUR ASS OVER HERE RIGHT NOW!!

sequence: 天城を蘇らせるための儀式が侵食の力で歪み、特異点「ナラク」が開かれてから少し後――

オブザーバーとの取引.say: 仲間から状況を聞き、「特異点」に覆われた重桜への支援艦隊を編成した後、しばし仮眠を取ることにした。
その時、「META」のヘレナから通信を受け、この危機からの逆転のために、南極にいるオブザーバーと打ち合わせることに。
…頭に襲いかかる猛烈な不快感の後、目の前にはホログラムの「ヘレナ」、コンパイラー、そして巨大な装置に浮かんでいるオブザーバーの姿があった。
オブザーバー、指揮官を助けなさい。その代わり、あなたのこの「枝」での存続を保証してあげるわ
断れば、ここで消えてもらうまでよ
さあ、受け入れるか拒否するか決めなさい。ほかに選択肢はないわ
ふふふ、いきなり突っかかってくるとはね。人に助けを求める態度かしら？
別にあなたに頼らなくても手はあるわ。あなただってそれはわかってるでしょう？
ええ、でも私と協力するのが一番の選択よ。そうでなければわざわざ会いに来ないものね？
ああ…一つ訂正するわ。別にこの取引は「あなた」が突きつけてきたわけじゃないみたいね
そこの指揮官はどう思ってるのかしら？
{playername}は立ち合っているにすぎないわ。あなたと話しているのは私よ
（彼女の言う通りだな。実際、自分はこの話し合いに関する前情報はほとんど持っていない）
（話し合いが始まる前に、「これからオブザーバーに協力してもらう」と説明されただけに過ぎない……）
（それに、自分はこの会議での「立ち合い」としか言われていない）
（「主機」を破壊されたコンパイラーが復活したのは、もしかしてデータかなにかを「ヘレナ」が回収したからなんだろうか？）
（…が、こっちが多勢とはいえ、オブザーバーにいきなりこうも強く出るなんて予想外だ）
（オブザーバーの反応から察するに、「存続」の話は願ってもない話なんだろうが……一筋縄ではいかない相手だ。どうなるか…）
あなた、指揮官の代わりにそんな重大な決定をできるの？
できるわ
試すのはもうなしよ。私はあなたがどんな状況か分かってるけど、あなたは私がどんな札を持っているかは「主機」に接続しても決して分からないでしょうね
そもそも、なぜ{playername}を連れてきたのか、あなたはわからないの？
……指揮官、特殊な「実験場」、特殊な「オブザーバー」………
さっきあなたが言っていたこと…本当にやれると思う？
何を馬鹿なことを。現にコンパイラーを連れてきたじゃない
違うわ。「主機」に繋げてしまえば、こちらの異常がすぐにバレて「リカバリー」されてしまうの
それが終わるまで、自然演算システムのリソースを使えないわ
もし「主機」にバレなければ？
ふーん。どうするつもり？
「タワー」よ
……なるほど
なるほど～ふふふ、「タワー」ね
ふふふ…はははは……あははははは！
……気が済んだ？
取引の条件を変更させてもらうわ。「存続」するのは私だけじゃなく、この実験場にいる「すべての上位個体」よ
いいわよ
「ナラク」が出た以上、すぐに決めて取り掛からないと準備が終わらないわね
でもあなた、本当に指揮官が彼女たちの情報をサルベージできると思う？
それができなければ、あなたの努力なんて何もかも無駄よ
できるわ
（……「ナラク」への対策は一刻も早く進めなければならない）
（しかし、オブザーバーが言った「情報のサルベージ」とは……？）
そう、なら取引成立よ
賢明な選択よ。オブザーバー
（……話がまとまったみたいだな）
（こっちの思った通り、さっき話に出てきた「存続」はセイレーンたちにとって大事なものらしい）
（こんなに強引な話をもちかけられていたというのに、うまく行き過ぎている気がしなくもないが……）
それで？再現する「記録」はどれがいい？
あなたが決めていいけど、一番安定しているので頼むわ
分かったわ。そっちはほかの子を接収する準備をしなさい。「主機」に接続するときにまた連絡するわ
わかったわ
（なるほど、「主機」との接続を切っているオブザーバーは自らの存続を願っているようだ）
（そして「ヘレナ」はそれを利用して、協力を引き出したってわけか）
（まだまだ自分の知っている情報は少ないが……「ヘレナ」が教えてくれないならそれは仕方がないな）
指揮官、もう大丈夫よ
疑問がたくさんあるでしょうけど、まだ時間はあるわ
これからあなたが知るべきことを全部教えてあげる
一緒に戦って、どんな「実験場」でも成せないことを成し遂げよう――

sequence: テスター「主機」空間周辺海域

テスターの消滅.say: 目を開くと、そこには執務室の天井――そして心配そうに覗き込んでいる仲間の姿があった。
指揮官、「ヘレナ」との話は終わった？
オブザーバーとの話し合いに参加する前、どうにか仲間たちにこれから「ヘレナ」と通信を行うことを伝えていた。
具体的に「相手がオブザーバーであり、特異点の対策に協力してもらおうとしている」ことは流石に伝えなかったが。
――ああ、「ナラク」の危険性と対策については見当がついた
――あれは思った以上に危ない代物だな
想像以上？TBはNAの特異点以上の「災害的」だって言ってたけど、まさかあれよりも恐ろしいの？
――ああ。そうだ
――これから皆に指示を出すが、内容を全て細かく説明している余裕はない
――みんなには「指揮官として最善の手を打っているつもり」ということは信じてほしい
もちろんよ。指揮官の命令や指示を聞かない子なんていないわ
――ありがとう。では記録を頼む
ええ！
1、テスターの「主機」鏡面海域の解析を停止し、「星の海」と「天星台」のリソースを全て特異点「ナラク」に回す
2、テスターの「主機」周辺の艦隊は全艦、こちらから送る新しい集結ポイントに向かい、「ナラク」に対する作戦準備を行う
そうして、テスターの「主機」空間周辺の海域から艦隊が完全に撤収すると――
どこからともなく、空から耳をつんざくような音が鳴り響いた。
次の瞬間、黒鋼の街が海に現れ、テスターの「主機」である塔が再び現実世界に姿を現した。
「主機」と建築群は静かに海の上に佇んでいるだけかと思われたのも束の間――
異変が突如現れた。
巨大な爆発とともに、テスターの「主機」が崩壊した。
大洋を手中に収めていたセイレーンの上位個体。その本体とも言える「主機」は実験場βから永遠に消えてなくなった――

sequence: 指揮官の艦隊　「ナラク」に進む途中

オミッターの消滅.say: あ！繋がった！
オミッターの消滅.actorName: ソオブラジーテリヌイ

オミッターの消滅.say: 同士指揮官！聞こえるかー！
オミッターの消滅.actorName: ソオブラジーテリヌイ

オミッターの消滅.say: ――聞こえてるとも天才メカニック。そっちは特異点「王冠」の周りにいるな？
そうだ！「王冠」に異常現象が起きてからずっと周辺で監視してた！
オミッターの消滅.actorName: ソオブラジーテリヌイ

オミッターの消滅.say: 本当は早く連絡したかったけど、ここらへんの通信ジャミングがさっきまで強くてな…
オミッターの消滅.actorName: ソオブラジーテリヌイ

オミッターの消滅.say: んで、ジャミングが消えたから早速同志指揮官に連絡したら繋がったというわけだ！
オミッターの消滅.actorName: ソオブラジーテリヌイ

オミッターの消滅.say: ――セイレーンのジャミングか？それなら心配しなくて大丈夫だ
ん？さては我らが同志指揮官はセイレーンのジャミングを無効化できるものでも作ったとかか……？
オミッターの消滅.actorName: ソオブラジーテリヌイ

オミッターの消滅.say: って、今はそんな話をしている場合じゃないな。同志指揮官、大変なことが起きたんだ！
オミッターの消滅.actorName: ソオブラジーテリヌイ

オミッターの消滅.say: ――オミッターが特異点「王冠」を破壊したことか？
そうみたいだ。しかも――
オミッターの消滅.actorName: ソオブラジーテリヌイ

オミッターの消滅.say: ――今度はオミッターの「主機」が急に現れてドカーンと自爆した？
そうだ！って同志指揮官、なんでそれを知ってるんだ？まさか…！
オミッターの消滅.actorName: ソオブラジーテリヌイ

オミッターの消滅.say: ……わたしたちをずっと覗き見してたんじゃないだろうなー！？
オミッターの消滅.actorName: ソオブラジーテリヌイ

オミッターの消滅.say: ――いや、まあ……ほかの情報源から知らされたんだ
おお！なるほど！さすが同志指揮官だ！
オミッターの消滅.actorName: ソオブラジーテリヌイ

オミッターの消滅.say: （ごめん！いつか必ずちゃんと説明するから！）
――コホン。とにかく、オミッターをはじめとする北極のセイレーンは気にしなくていい
――ロシアたちに連絡し、艦隊を連れて特異点「ナラク」への作戦を支援してほしい！
特異点？「ナラク」？
オミッターの消滅.actorName: ソオブラジーテリヌイ

オミッターの消滅.say: ――詳しい作戦内容はあとで連絡する！
わかった！
オミッターの消滅.actorName: ソオブラジーテリヌイ

オミッターの消滅.say: ――もう「主機」を2つも破壊したとは……オブザーバー、手が早いな……
――「ヘレナ」のフォローがあるとはいえ、時間を浪費できないってわけか…

sequence: ピュリファイアーの「主機」
スペアボディ格納室（という名の休憩スペース）

ピュリファイアーの消滅.say: ふああああ……ヒマだ……
南極であんなに派手にやったのに、戦闘への参加は許さないで支援だけさせやがって…
あ！もしかしてオブザーバーのやつ「主機」に脅かされてようやく自ら戦う気になったか？
あいつが直接戦う姿…………全っ然想像できねぇけど
まあ別にいっか～。あいついつもマイペースだし変なこと考えるのはリソースの無駄無駄無駄ァ！
でも実験は全部中止だし、本当に退屈なんだよなぁ～
んああああー！
つまらーーん！退屈だー！！いつになったら戦わせてくれるんだー！！！
ふかふかのカーペットでゴロゴロしていたピュリファイアーだが、ふと何かを思いついたのか急に体を起こした。
あ！大洋での戦いを覗いてやろっと！
ずいぶんと大きく出たし、テスターがやらかさなきゃ……ん？
データベースにあるデータが読み込まれてる？
いや待て……読み込まれてるだけじゃなく、ほかのところに移動されてる…！？
ざけんな！このピュリファイアーに断りもなくなんてことを！？
慌てて「主機」のデータベースにアクセスすると、データが急速に減っていっていることがすぐに分かった。
もう大半なくなってるじゃねぇか！……あれ、でもあたしピンピンしてる？
リソース使用……異常なし。これは何だ？ってか私のデータはどこに移動させられた！？
コマンドを次々と飛ばすピュリファイアーだが、その努力は虚しくデータは刻一刻と移動され続けている。
そしてすべてのデータがほかのところに移転されると――自爆プログラムが起動した。
え！？ちょっ、おま――
巨大な爆発とともに、ピュリファイアーの「主機」がキレイな花火となった。
南大洋を集中に収めていたセイレーンの上位個体。その本体とも言える「主機」は実験場βから永遠に消えてなくなった――

特異点へ.say: 特異点「ナラク」周辺海域
重桜を覆う「大結界」と同化した特異点。艦隊はその赤黒い天地を視認できる距離まで接近していた。
武蔵の努力で結界にひびがつき、中から脱出した重桜の仲間たちの一部と合流できた。
仲間たちの話から、重桜の内情をどうにか把握することに成功した。
（赤城は天城を蘇らせようとしたが、その想いが利用されてしまい、「特異点」が開かれてしまった）
（三笠と武蔵は侵食の拡大と見てすぐ予備計画に切り替え、どうにか仲間たちを霊山まで退避させたようだ）
（だが被害も甚大だ。加賀が行方不明、武蔵、三笠たちを含め三割以上の艦船が戦闘不能に、ほぼすべての量産艦は破壊されたか侵食に飲まれている）
（………予測された最悪な事態とほぼ変わりない。自分がもっと早く気づいていれば…）
…そうね。重桜艦隊はまさに壊滅的な被害を受けているわ
「ナラク」はそれだけ危険な特異点よ
でも幸いなことに、重桜内部でもこの状況を予測してた子がいるの
――まさか……
大和よ
「神通」が彼女を一番評価してたのも頷けるわね
三笠と武蔵もいざという時の計画を立てていたけど、やっぱり彼女が一枚上手みたいね
いいえ、一枚上手どころじゃないわね…彼女は情報が限られている中で、ほぼ最善と言える行動に出た
彼女の行動のおかげで、「ナラク」にて倒れた子たちを救う道ができたわ
――救う…だと？リュウコツの侵食から？
艦船のリュウコツが大きく損傷を受けると、中にある情報が散逸してしまい、やがてフネとしてもヒトとしても「死」を迎えるの
でもその情報……彼女たちの記憶や想い、すなわち「タマシイ」が無事に保護されていたら？
――「個」としてのアイデンティティが残れば、彼女たちを無事に治療できる？……いや、そんなことが……
それが「タマシイ」というものよ。赤城が狙っていたのはそれね
フネとしての「概念」、そしてヒトとしての「記憶」があれば、それを「タマシイ」の情報として「天城」という存在を再構築できる…
…そう踏んだのかもしれないわ。現に「ナラク」のすべてが「天城」という存在に関わっているもの
この作戦がうまく行けば、きっと何もかもが上手く元に戻るはずよ
（そうして、特異点「ナラク」への作戦を練り直すことになった…）
赤城があなたを守るために「夢」を操作しなかったことで、今回の作戦のピースであるナラク、オブザーバー、そして指揮官が揃った
特異点「ナラク」はワタツミをコアに、オリジンキューブの力で誕生したもの
だからその性質はワタツミ……かつて北方連合に落ちた隕石と同じ性質を持つの。つまり周りの環境を同化し「夢」を現実として具現化させる性質よ
赤城が「夢」で現れた天城を具現化させようとしたのと同じく、私たちも同じ方法で天城を具現化させればいい
ただし、すでに侵食された天城のタマシイではなく、「自然演算システム」でサルベージした違う情報を使って、ね
指揮官は「自然演算システム」を知っているでしょ？
審判者の計画の中核にして、アンチエックスたちの最重要施設
その本体は「零」によって直接管理されていて、誰もその場所を知らないけど……
でも「枝」のオブザーバーはそれに接続できる権限を持ってるから、実験場を支配できるのはそれが理由よ
それに接続しなければ、この「枝」のオブザーバーのような状況になる
…話が脱線したわね。要するに、今回はオブザーバーに再度「自然演算システム」に接続させて、過去の「記録」に基づいて一つの世界を作り出すというわけ
そして中の情報をナラクに投影して…「再現」してもらうわ
私たちは「再現」された世界に入って――
時が止まった天城を蘇らせるための「タマシイ」、つまり情報をサルベージすればいいわ
――簡単に言ってくれるな……
――このやり方なら、リュウコツの侵食や損傷で倒れた子を元に戻せるのか？
……それは違うわ
「ナラク」を構成する要素、ワタツミ、オリジンキューブ、そしてなにより赤城の想いは状況を限定させているの
赤城が想っている天城……ううん、加賀やほかの重桜の仲間たちでもいいかもしれないけど
「すべて」に適応させるのは間違いなく無理よ
とにかく、サルベージはあなた自身が艦隊を率いて行わなきゃならないの
最後だけど、「特異点」を放置すれば、引き寄せられた侵食が外に漏れ出しこの「枝」を覆い尽くすわ
あなたがサルベージを行っている間、残った艦隊は特異点の外部を死守し、結界を削ぎつつ侵食の拡散を阻止しなければならない
それだけでなく、もう一つの艦隊を編成し、特異点に作られた天城の「混じり物」を倒し「概念」を一度剥がしてちょうだい
どんなものであれ天城はすでに復活したの。今更そのニセモノをすべての人々の記憶から消すのは無理よ
だからあれを一度「沈めて」おかないと、本物の天城を蘇らせられないわ
……赤城があなたを想っていて本当に良かったわね
あなたがいないと、この状況は詰んでいたかもしれない
…「混じり物」を倒す艦隊は私がどうにかするわ。指揮官はまず「再現」に侵入する仲間を集めて
（特異点の侵食阻止、偽の天城の撃破、本物の天城の情報サルベージ……といった流れの作戦計画を「ヘレナ」と共に立てた）
（自然演算システムを使って「再現」された世界のサンプルに入るなんて、よくよく考えるととんでもないことだが…）
（どうやって情報をサルベージするか、天城を蘇らせるにあたっての「概念」の扱いはどうなるか、自分の役割はなど…）
（不確定なものがいくつか残っている……）
（トントントン）
指揮官、大丈夫？
――問題ない。それより赤城の様子はどうだ？
だいぶ落ち着いてきたけど…侵食の浄化は相変わらず拒んでいるわね
――こちらに会いに来ようとしないし、相当堪えているようだ…
そうみたいね……
（天城だけでなく、加賀への罪悪感も……なんとか彼女を立ち直らせる方法は…）
もう一つ。証言によると、どうやら赤城と例の「混じり物」は意思疎通が取れていないみたいね
「虚像幻境」で長門を襲い、比叡をさらったのは赤城の意思じゃないみたいし
テスターの「主機」を奪おうとしたことも何も知らされていなかったらしいわ
――「混じり物」の意志は赤城に影響されていない、というわけか
――対処するときは気をつけないとな
ねえ指揮官、本当にオブザーバーと協力していいの？
赤城もビスマルクも、オブザーバーと協力したからああなったんだし…
やっぱり私、ちょっと心配で……
作戦の説明をした際、メンフィスだけでなく少なくない仲間たちが不安を表明した。
――オブザーバーを信じるつもりはない
――だが「ヘレナ」…仲間たちを信じたい
――オブザーバーとの取引は確かに危険だが、それだけの価値はある
でも…指揮官が自ら特異点に入らなくても……
――いや、自分が行かなくてはならない
……「ヘレナ」がそう言ったから？
――それだけじゃない。赤城も皆もいるから
……また「ヘレナ」…そんなにあの「ヘレナ」のことを信じるの…？
――メンフィス？
いいえ！私も指揮官を信頼しているって言いたかったの！
通信…？ええと、重桜の水無月？
なんであの子が……しかも指揮官乗艦に……？
――おそらくこの連絡は水無月ではなく、大和からだろう
そう？赤城にも連絡しといたほうがいい？
――赤城のことなら……
赤城、指揮官に繋げるぞ
指揮官、長門だ。赤城と瑞鶴を無事に救出したのだが……
――赤城、大丈夫か？！怪我はない？
ごめんなさい…指揮官様……ごめんなさい……私……私……
私………っ……私がこんなことをして……きっと指揮官様も……
――落ち着いて。自分はここにいる。すぐに行くから
加賀がいなくなって………天城姉さまはもう蘇らない……重桜は壊滅状態……これ以上…これ以上どうすればいいの…………
私が仲間を傷つけ、特異点を開いた……いくら指揮官様でも……もうどうすることもできないじゃない………
ごめんなさい………私は……赤城は……もう………
指揮官様……「ナラク」を閉じて…この悪夢を終わらせて…………
――ああ。そうするとも
（色々と宥めたが、それでも赤城の心の傷を癒やすまでは至らなかった）
（痛ましいが、この因果はやっぱり彼女自身で解決できるようにするしか…）
――あとでもう一度説得しよう。いずれにしても侵食状態のまま放置させるのは危険だ
分かったわ
（それにしてもなぜこのタイミングで大和が……もしや重桜本島のほうで何か起きたか？）
――指揮官だ。水無月、すまないが大和に替わってもらえるか？

sequence: 自然演算システムクエリ申請――確認中
範囲設定：天城邸宅周辺
サンプル生成中――生成完了
データダウンロード中――ダウンロード完了
自然演算システム――演算完了

「再現」のサンプル.say: ふふふ。順調ね。これであなたがほしいものを手に入れたわ
あとはこれを「ナラク」の指定区域に投影して「再現」させればいい
ここまであからさまに動いたのに、「主機」にバレていないなんて
「タワー」の力があるとはいえ、それをあなたが操っている――ますます気になるわ
無駄な好奇心の感情を削除しなさい。オブザーバー
ええ。それにしても赤城を説得できるなんて、指揮官はなかなかやるわね
「ナラク」の内部がどうなっているかとか、この作戦がどれほど困難なものなのかとか、あなたは全部分かっているのに指揮官を行かせた
ねえ、どうしてそんなことができるの？
もう一度言う。変なところに好奇心を抱くんじゃないわ
じゃあこっちは世界サンプルの投影の準備にかかるわ
その間にも「主機」との接続を維持する必要があるから…ちゃんと私を守ってちょうだいね？

出発.say: 特異点「ナラク」周辺海域、しばらくして――
気持ちは分かるが、くれぐれも自分の身の安全にも気をつけるのだぞ
……はい。気をつけます。長門さま
余とてお主を止めなかった罪を犯している、すべてを自分の責任だと思うな。何かあれば指揮官の指示に従え
もちろんですわ
瑞鶴と龍鳳のことも頼んだぞ
こんな私が言うのもなんですが…長門さまはいつからそんなに心配性になったのですか？
……っ。それはお主のことを案じて……
それは分かっていますわ。ですがそれだけじゃなく、この作戦は指揮官様が体を張っているから…でしょう？
う、うむ……
……？指揮官、赤城と何を話したの？
ついさっきまであんなに落ち込んでいたのに……もう元気が戻ったの？
――……まあ、世界サンプルの話をしたことが大きいだろうな
それであんなに変わるんだ…指揮官がすごいというか、赤城の心が強いというか……
はあ…その強さこそが重桜を率いるのに必要かもしれないわね
――そうだな。赤城だって頑張ってる
（重桜の皆を奮い立たせるためにも、執念を捨てた「いつもの赤城」として立ち振る舞ってくれているのかもな）
赤城先輩、準備が終わりました
……ええ、順調で何よりね
赤城先輩、本当に私も一緒に行っていいんですか…？ほら私、結界で赤城先輩にあんなことを…
今更何を言っているの五航戦……私のことはともかく、指揮官様のお役に立てるこの上ない機会ですわ
（……それにもし天城姉さまに会えたら、今の重桜にはこんなに素晴らしい子がいるって紹介しないと……）
……こほん。指揮官様！こちらの準備はできましたわー！
指揮官、呼ばれているわよ？
元気になったのはいいけど、なんだか調子に乗っているような……
――まあまあ、今回の作戦ではそのほうがいいさ
（そうだ。大和に託されたことは彼女の協力も必要だしな）
「儀式の結界にて倒れた重桜のタマシイは妾が確保し、特異点さえ無くなれば皆の蘇生は可能…されどこれは全員にあらず」
「残されしはただ一人」
「そう。赤城の身代わりになった……加賀」
「加賀はナラクに呑み込まれてしまい、妾とてタマシイを全て回収することができなかった」
「彼女を蘇生させるには天城同様、タマシイの回収が必要」
「天城を救い、加賀を救い、重桜を救い、世界をも救う……」
「汝ならばそんな奇跡を起こせると信じている――」
（そうだな。皆を救って全部元に戻してこそ、赤城との約束が果たされる…）
――エンタープライズ、自分と長門艦隊が「ナラク」に進入したあと、大洋での作戦指揮を任せる
――ほかの陣営の仲間たちにも話しておいたから、みんな協力してくれるはずだ
――作戦は先程指示した通り、結界の「ひび」から儀式の法陣の中央への道を切り開き、特異点を外部から破壊する準備をしてもらう
――また、結界の外に漏れ出した敵を全て倒し、浄化も行ってほしい
――「星の海」と東煌の「天星台」は特異点の状況を随時モニタリングしている。ここ以外にも「ひび」が出たらすぐ対処するように
――自分が帰還するか、作戦時間が経過するまで、侵食の拡散を全力で阻止してくれ！
分かった。外は任せてくれ
……指揮官、どうか気を付けて
一方、「混じり物」を撃破するための特異点侵入艦隊も着々と準備を進めている。
長門さま、本当に良いのですか？さすがにこれは危険すぎでは……
余はすでに意を決した。これ以上言うでない
せめて江風も同行させてください！長門様！
駄目だ。お主はワタツミとの適正を持たぬ、接続も叶わぬ、ここは余でどうにかする
長門さまは神通がお守りいたします。どうかご心配なく
…武蔵さんが倒れるのを阻止できなかったあなたに信を置けない
…では僭越ながら今回は勝手について行かせていただきます。作戦が終わった後、武蔵さんには改めて謝罪しますので
…………その言葉、覚えたぞ
長門さま、時間だよ。準備はいい？
うむ
リュウコツに永続的な損傷を残さず、浄化すると元に戻る…本当なんですよね？
キューブの安全装置があれば「META」の侵食はある程度耐えられますし
そしてリュウコツの表層のみを対象とし、加減さえすれば一時的な「META」化は体に無害です
――信じるかどうかは皆さん次第ですが
ふわりんの名にかけて、必ず長門様を元に戻す……
「霞」……分かりました。信じます
特異点はワタツミに基づいて生み出されたもの、だから「混じり物」の居場所を特定するには、ワタツミに接続する存在が必要だ。
といっても、特異点の中では侵食が蔓延っており、対策をしなければ飛鷹と隼鷹のように正気を失ってしまう。
そこで逆の発想で、予め「META」化して、浄化手段を携行しておけば侵食を抑制しつつ中で活動可能というわけだ。
……と、ここまでは「ヘレナ」と共に打ち出した戦法だ。
そして同じ「META」である神通と霞、志願した長門の3人で最小限の艦隊を編成した。
長門は「霞」の力で一時的に「META」になるが……
「霞」、始めよ
かしこまりました。長門さま
「霞」は両手にある青い炎を長門の胸に近づけた。
すると長門は青い炎に包みこまれ、その意識もまた静かに奥深くまで沈んでいく。

sequence: 「満ち欠けは月の定め、咲いては散るは花の定め」
「命が巡り、守りの力は絶えることなし」
「余は長門、重桜の御狐長門である」
「お主の願いは分かっておる」
「重桜の仲間を守るのが余の願い」
「ならばその願いを叶えてやろう」
「余の力を、思う存分使うが良い」

出発.say: 炎が舞い上がり、中から「META」の力を身に宿した長門が現れた。
ふぅ………これで良いか？
長門さま、どうかした？
少しめまいがする。なんだか……音を聞き、景色を見たのだが…
……？霞にちょっと見せて…？
異常はあるか？
ううん、全然。長門さま、思ったよりも調子がいいの
ならばよい
特異点に入ったら約束通り、長門さまはニセモノ天城を探すのに集中して？なるべく力を使わないように、戦いは霞と神通に任せて
うむ。早く出発しよう

エウロパの戦場.say: オブザーバーのサポートがあるためか、世界各所との通信は至ってスムーズだった。
特異点「ナラク」が現れてから、NA海域中心の特異点もまたその活動が活発化した。
エンタープライズたちが「ナラク」の対処をしている時、ニュージャージーやエウロパ大陸の各陣営もまたNA海域の対処にあたっているが…
アイリス・聖堂
ジャンヌ、アルジェリー、二人はアイリス艦隊を率いて、NA海域中心部の支援に当たってください
ニュージャージーがそこで指揮をしています。二人にはみんなと一緒に特異点を抑えつつ、指揮官の作戦行動の時間を稼いでもらいます
かしこまりました。艦隊集結次第すぐ出発します
ええ、一つになったアイリスの護教騎士の強さをみんなに見せるわ
艦隊集結は現地で問題ありません。二人だけでなく即応できる子は出撃準備次第すぐに駆けつけてください
今回の作戦で重要なのは速度ですから
まだ出撃準備が終わっていない艦隊はジャン・バールがあとで率いて向かいます
はい！
アイリス・鉄血領事施設
ティルピッツ、NA海域は鉄血本土艦隊、北海艦隊の2艦隊で対処するわ
指揮官が「ナラク」で戦っている間、全力で時間を稼いで
ええ。必ずや任務を全うするわ
アイリス・サディア領事施設
地中海の艦隊はもちろん、タラントとアレクサンドリア、水都などの駐留艦隊も連れて行って！
エウロパの戦場.actorName: ヴィットリオ・ヴェネト

エウロパの戦場.say: あとは帝都の駐留艦隊、量産艦…そうね、空中戦力も！
エウロパの戦場.actorName: ヴィットリオ・ヴェネト

エウロパの戦場.say: アイリス艦隊が出撃し始めていますから、ドックが空き次第すぐこちらの艦隊の整備も頼み込んできます
エウロパの戦場.actorName: ヴィットリオ・ヴェネト

エウロパの戦場.say: だからリットリオ、今回はサディアの全戦力でこの栄光なる戦いに加勢しましょう！
エウロパの戦場.actorName: ヴィットリオ・ヴェネト

エウロパの戦場.say: 確かに黒幕はサディアの威光におびえているようですけど、これは私たちだけの話ではありません
エウロパの戦場.actorName: ヴィットリオ・ヴェネト

エウロパの戦場.say: 全力を出して、我々サディア帝国も重要な戦力であることを指揮官さまに証明してみせないと！
エウロパの戦場.actorName: ヴィットリオ・ヴェネト

エウロパの戦場.say: 大丈夫だヴェネト、分かっている！今回ばかりは敵も味方も驚かせるとも！
アイリス・審判廷秘密施設
アイリス、ユニオン、鉄血、サディア、そして「余燼」まで……あ、ロイヤルは動いていないわね
あの「キーロフ」の話によると全ての特異点が制御不能になる恐れがあるらしいけど、今のところ「アヴァロンの扉」はまだ大丈夫みたいね
陛下もよくやっていらっしゃる。ふふふ
とはいえ、このまま陛下だけ蚊帳の外だと可哀想だから…
ロイヤル艦隊、そして信濃たち重桜艦隊…悪いけど指揮官のために一つ頑張ってもらうわ

浮きドック再び.say: 指揮官たちが特異点に侵入したと同時に、エンタープライズたちもまた各々の戦いを始めた。
伊吹、重桜艦隊の戦力はどこまで回復している？
